utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hey , Mon , if you were hoping to sleep with Joshua the first time tonight , which one of these would you want to be wearing .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know what ? It really creeps me out choosing other people’s sex clothes .

emotion_cause.span: 2_It really creeps me out choosing other people’s sex clothes .
2_It really creeps me out choosing other people’s sex clothes .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I have been waiting for this for months !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am making him a very fancy meal .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What am I making him by the way ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Well , you are making him a frieze salad with goat cheese and pine nuts , wild nuts , wild rice , roast asparagus , and salmon au croup .

emotion_cause.span: 10_you are making him a frieze salad with goat cheese and pine nuts , wild nuts , wild rice , roast asparagus , and salmon au croup .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I thought I was making him filet mignon ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_you are making him a frieze salad with goat cheese and pine nuts , wild nuts , wild rice , roast asparagus , and salmon au croup .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yeah , you were , but you decided to make salmon because you had some left over at the restaurant .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And then you realised if you bitched about it , then you would stop cooking , and you would have to make your famous baked potato and Diet Coke .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Wow , I really get crabby when I cook .

emotion_cause.span: 14_I really get crabby when I cook .
